description: Pushes Telemetry and EVRs to TimescaleDB to be viewed with Grafana

user.title: User
user.description: Database user. Leave blank to use the OS user.

password.description: Database password. Leave blank if not required.

telemetry.title: Log Telemetry
telemetry.description: Push telemetry channels to this database.
